def positive_chain_of_boolean_or_conditions_over_same_value_not_using_in_operator():
    rule_id = "chain_of_boolean_or_conditions_over_same_value_not_using_in_operator"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Three or more `x == 'a' or x == 'b' or ...` conditions chained; use `x in {'a', 'b', ...}`."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
